hook.say: Everyone thought Rose Tyler was gone. She isn't.
hook.show: Everyone thought Rose Tyler was gone. She isn't.

lines.say: Billie Piper reprises her iconic Doctor Who role this August.
lines.show: Billie Piper reprises her iconic Doctor Who role this August.

lines.say: She joins Christopher Eccleston in new audio series Dark Tides.
lines.show: She joins Christopher Eccleston in new audio series *Dark Tides*.

lines.say: The story sees Rose and The Doctor in a brutal, gothic space adventure.
lines.show: The story sees Rose and The Doctor in a brutal, gothic space adventure.

lines.say: It's available for preorder now from Big Finish Productions.
lines.show: It's available for preorder now from Big Finish Productions.

lines.say: This marks Piper's first audio return since 2025's TV finale.
lines.show: This marks Piper's first audio return since 2025's TV finale.

lines.say: Fans are buzzing: will this lead to a full TV comeback?
lines.show: Fans are buzzing: will this lead to a full TV comeback?

lines.say: Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
lines.show: Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.

captions.instagram: Billie Piper is back as Rose Tyler! Catch her alongside Christopher Eccleston in the new Doctor Who audio series *Dark Tides*, available for preorder now. Is this a sign of more to come for Rose? #DoctorWho #RoseTyler #BilliePiper #ChristopherEccleston #DoctorWhoAudio #BigFinish #DarkTides #ScreenReport #TVNews #SciFi
captions.facebook: Rose Tyler is returning to the Doctor Who universe! Billie Piper stars with Christopher Eccleston in a brand new audio adventure, 'Dark Tides,' out this August. What do you hope to see from Rose's return?

pinterest.title: Billie Piper Returns as Rose Tyler in New Doctor Who Audio Series
pinterest.description: Billie Piper is reprising her role as Rose Tyler alongside Christopher Eccleston's Ninth Doctor in the new audio series 'Dark Tides,' available for preorder. This marks a major return for the fan-favorite companion. Get all the details on this gothic space adventure and what it means for Doctor Who's future.

youtube.title: Billie Piper Returns as Rose Tyler in New Doctor Who Audio Series! #Shorts
youtube.description: Billie Piper is back as Rose Tyler in 'The Ninth Doctor Adventures: Dark Tides' with Christopher Eccleston. This audio series is available for preorder now!

captions.x: Billie Piper returns as Rose Tyler in a new Doctor Who audio series with Christopher Eccleston! 'Dark Tides' is out this August. #DoctorWho #RoseTyler

spoken: Everyone thought Rose Tyler was gone. She isn't. Billie Piper reprises her iconic Doctor Who role this August. She joins Christopher Eccleston in new audio series Dark Tides. The story sees Rose and The Doctor in a brutal, gothic space adventure. It's available for preorder now from Big Finish Productions. This marks Piper's first audio return since 2025's TV finale. Fans are buzzing: will this lead to a full TV comeback? Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
